name: @fora/object-store
description: FORA object-store adapter. Forbids reads/writes that cross tenant boundaries by (1) refusing keys not matching ^tenants/{tenant_id}/... in-process and (2) signing the expected prefix into every presigned URL / signed request via a per-tenant session tag so the cloud-side IAM policy is the real gate. Covers S3, GCS, SQS, and OpenSearch. v1 implementation per FORA-124 acceptance bar #3.
